ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., TE, WR, RB) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team that the player belongs to */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the performance entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player associated with the stats */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week of the season for which the stats are recorded */,
  "targets" REAL /* Number of targets received by the player */,
  "receptions" REAL /* Number of receptions made by the player */,
  "reception_pct" REAL /* Reception percentage calculated from targets */,
  "yards" REAL /* Total yards gained from receptions */,
  "touchdowns" REAL /* Touchdowns scored by the player */,
  "longest_reception" REAL /* Longest reception of the week */,
  "yards_after_catch" REAL /* Total yards gained after the catch */,
  "dropped_passes" INTEGER /* Number of dropped passes */,
  "red_zone_receptions" INTEGER /* Number of receptions in the red zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rushing_stats" (
  "rush_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the rushing entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player associated with the rushing stats */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week of the season for which the rushing stats are recorded */,
  "rush_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of rushing attempts made by the player */,
  "rush_yards" REAL /* Total yards gained from rushing */,
  "rush_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Total rushing touchdowns scored by the player */,
  "fumbles" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles made by the player */,
  "fumbles_lost" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles lost by the player */,
  "longest_rush" REAL /* Longest rushing play of the week */,
  "rush_yards_after_contact" REAL /* Yards gained after contact */,
  "rush_attempts_per_game" REAL /* Average rushing attempts per game */,
  "rush_yards_per_attempt" REAL /* Average yards gained per rushing attempt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rush_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rushing_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fantasy_points" (
  "fantasy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the fantasy points entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player associated with the fantasy points */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week of the season for which the points are calculated */,
  "points" REAL /* Total fantasy points scored by the player */,
  "projection" REAL /* Projected fantasy points for the week */,
  "difference" REAL /* Difference between actual and projected fantasy points */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player in fantasy points for the week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fantasy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_points_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division within the conference */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Current head coach of the team */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week of the match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance for the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the account holder */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for account security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role assigned to the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user for communication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the report is about */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data captured in the report, typically in JSON format */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., weekly, monthly, season) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report's key findings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injury_reports" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury report */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player with the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury sustained */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current status of the injury (e.g., active, recovered, doubtful) */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Expected return date to play */,
  "date_of_injury" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injured_body_part" TEXT /* Body part that is injured */,
  "injured_body_part_status" TEXT /* Detailed status of the injured body part (e.g., sprained, torn) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injury_reports_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_performance" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for historical performance entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player associated with the historical stats */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the performance data */,
  "avg_yards" REAL /* Average yards gained by the player per game */,
  "avg_touchdowns" REAL /* Average touchdowns scored by the player per season */,
  "total_games_played" INTEGER /* Total number of games played in the season */,
  "total_receptions" INTEGER /* Total number of receptions in the season */,
  "total_rush_attempts" INTEGER /* Total number of rushing attempts in the season */,
  "total_fumbles" INTEGER /* Total number of fumbles in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
